MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF NAZZAL, JIHAD COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-25-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

JUDGE DIANE WICK, DEPT. 611, REPORTER: BRENDA FIELDS, CLERK: DIANNE BOFFI. C/C FOR COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON NOV-25-2002 - LAWRENCE FASANO APPEARS WITH HIS CLIENT JIHAD NAZZAL. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT KENT MARTIN. THE CASE PROCEEDS AS A PROVE-UP WITH NO DEFENDANT. NO EXHBITS WERE MARKED. THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING DETERMINATION: NO DEFENDANT IS PRESENT IN DEPT. 611 AFTER RECEIVING PROPER NOTICE TO APPEAR. NO CASE IN OPPOSITION. THE COURT AWARDS PLAINTIFF RESTITUTION OF 85 RICHLAND, #2 AND $5,665.62 IN DAMAGES WHICH INCLUDES $600 PURSUANT TO CCP 1174(B) AS WELL AS COSTS. DEFENDANT KENT MARTIN IS ORDERED TO VACATE THE PREMISES. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE ORDER.

MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT KENT MARTIN Motion To Strike:
APPEAR: Lawrence W. Fasano, Jr., Esq. 956-8800 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.

To Quash Service Of Summons
Off Calendar Oct-01-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEAR: Lawrence W. Fasano, Jr., Esq. 956-8800 for pltf & opposing party; no other appearances.
RULING: Pltf dismissed trespass count this morning, therefore the Court denied deft's motion to quash. 5 days to plead. Pltf to prepare order. (302/AJR/PB) Court reporter Patricia M. Evezich, CSR #1193
